commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an `agent:turn:transcript:save` internal hook, wires direct and dispatch ACP turns through an awaited transcript-save callback, updates docs/tests, and hardens related gateway test fixtures.

PR surface: Source +278, Tests +813, Docs +3. Total +1094 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR for a new internal hook event, not a reported current-main bug with a failing reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair lane is appropriate because the remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of a new internal hook/save-order contract.

target.title: feat(hooks): add ACP turn transcript save hook
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a separate `agent:turn:transcript:save` internal hook event that reports the ACP turn transcript save outcome. This split is intentionally based directly on `main` and does not include the `agent:turn:end` lifecycle hook from sibling PR #89152.

## Changes
- Adds `agent:turn:transcript:save` event typing, validation, and documentation with explicit `saved`, `skipped`, and `failed` outcomes.
- Awaits the existing transcript/session save work before reporting `saveOutcome: saved`; missing callbacks, declined boundaries, missing durable-write evidence, and save failures become explicit non-saved outcomes.
- Wires both chat dispatch ACP turns and direct ACP command turns through the manager save callback so durable-write evidence is observed before the hook event.
- Adds focused tests for manager outcomes, dispatch transcript persistence, direct ACP transcript persistence, invalid callback results, skipped outcomes, and failed runtime turns.
- Hardens gateway test fixtures that the changed-path OpenGrep check surfaced: env restoration no longer bulk-copies saved host env back into `process.env`, and noServer WebSocket test servers now set an explicit preauth `maxPayload`.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: confirms the save-outcome split branch contains the write-safe `agent:turn:transcript:save` hook and no `agent:turn:end` lifecycle hook surface.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at `/Users/mantis/Projects/openclaw-pr-turn-save`, branch `feat/agent-turn-save-outcome-hook`, head `9db27aace3`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: inspected the live checkout with `rg`, then ran focused and broader ACP save-path tests, affected gateway fixture tests, lint/format checks, diff whitespace checks, and TypeScript core test compile from the same branch.
- Evidence after fix:
```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
9db27aace3
$ rg -n "agent:turn:save|turn:save" src docs extensions packages scripts test --glob '!extensions/diffs/assets/viewer-runtime.js'
<no output; exit 1>
$ rg -n "agent:turn:transcript:save|turn:transcript:save" docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts
... docs, manager emit, and hook type guard all reference agent:turn:transcript:save / turn:transcript:save ...
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts
[test] passed 5 Vitest shards in 19.65s
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/gateway/server-discovery-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server.plugin-node-capability-auth.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-hardening.test.ts
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 8.55s
$ pnpm tsgo:core:test
<exit 0>
```
- Observed result after fix: the branch has transcript save outcome wiring in both chat dispatch and direct ACP command paths, has no lifecycle-end symbols, has no stale `agent:turn:save` hook strings, focused save-path tests pass, affected gateway fixture tests pass, and the branch typechecks.
- What was not tested: a full live ACP backend session on a production user account was not run from this branch.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof is from a local source checkout; the hook is internal and requires an installed hook handler to observe at runtime. Local changed-path OpenGrep rerun could not be performed because `opengrep` is not installed on this machine; CI is the verifier for that check after the fixture hardening commit.

## Testing
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts`
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/gateway/server-discovery-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server.plugin-node-capability-auth.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-hardening.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-transcript.runtime.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/gateway/server-discovery-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server.plugin-node-capability-auth.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-hardening.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-transcript.runtime.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/commands/agent.acp.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/server-discovery-runtime.test.ts src/gateway/server.plugin-node-capability-auth.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-hardening.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`
